title: NASA Earth Observatory
description: A NASA source card for satellite-based Earth science images, maps, and explainers.
license: Public Domain / NASA Media Usage Guidelines

pages.text: NASA Earth Observatory publishes satellite images and explanations about atmosphere, land, water, climate, natural hazards, and human impacts.
Use this source for visual nonfiction: students can read images as evidence, compare maps over time, and connect observations to Earth systems.
NASA materials are generally public domain as U.S. government work, but some images, partner resources, and logos have separate usage rules. Check item-level rights.
